changelog:
New app icon.
• Replaced placeholder saffron 'N' launcher icon with the gold PS-in-photo-frame mark on dark navy
• Full adaptive-icon assets at every density (mdpi → xxxhdpi) so the icon looks crisp on every phone
• Themed-icon monochrome variant for Android 13+ Material You
• Splash-screen icon updated to a matching saffron signature-flourish glyph on ivory
